items.caption: A group of seven individuals, presumably business executives, in a crowded elevator of an office building. the elevator is filled with people, some of whom are engaged in conversation, while others are standing or walking. the individuals are dressed in business attire, with visible ties and suits, suggesting a professional setting. the illustration is rendered in a flat vector style, with a limited color palette, and the background is a simple, nondescript representation of an elevator interior. the overall impression is one of a busy, bustling work environment.
